CustomField.formula: 3-((5 * ( FLOOR( ( TODAY() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( TODAY() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - (5 * ( FLOOR( ( Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( Date_Status_changed_to_In_PSO_Review__c - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Counter begins only when "Status" is changed to "In PSO Review".
CustomField.label: PSO - Days remaining to apply RAG
